parameters.name: Motor NP Volts
parameters.purpose: Stop drive before changing this parameter. Set to the motor nameplate rated volts.

source_citation.doc: PowerFlex 40 Adjustable Frequency AC Drive User Manual (22B-UM001J-EN-E)
source_citation.excerpt: P031 [Motor NP Volts] Related Parameters: d004, A084, A085, A086, A087

parameters.name: Motor NP Hertz
parameters.purpose: Stop drive before changing this parameter. Set to the motor nameplate rated frequency.

source_citation.doc: PowerFlex 40 Adjustable Frequency AC Drive User Manual (22B-UM001J-EN-E)
source_citation.excerpt: P032 [Motor NP Hertz] Related Parameters: A084, A085, A086, A087, A090

parameters.name: Motor OL Current
parameters.purpose: A098, A114, A118 Set to the maximum allowable motor current. The drive will fault on an F7 Motor Overload if the value of this parameter is exceeded by 150% for 60 seconds.

parameters.name: Minimum Freq
parameters.purpose: A086, A087, A110, A112 Sets the lowest frequency the drive will output continuously.

parameters.name: Maximum Freq
parameters.purpose: A078, A085, A086, A087, A111, A113 Stop drive before changing this parameter. Sets the highest frequency the drive will output.

parameters.name: Comm Loss Action
parameters.purpose: Selects the drive’s response to a loss of the communication connection or excessive communication errors. RAM.

source_citation.doc: PowerFlex 40 Adjustable Frequency AC Drive User Manual (22B-UM001J-EN-E)
source_citation.excerpt: A105 [Comm Loss Action] Related Parameters: d015, P037, A106

parameters.name: Comm Loss Time
parameters.purpose: Sets the time that the drive will remain in communication loss before implementing the option selected in A105 [Comm Loss Action].

source_citation.doc: PowerFlex 40 Adjustable Frequency AC Drive User Manual (22B-UM001J-EN-E)
source_citation.excerpt: A106 [Comm Loss Time] Related Parameters: d015, A105

parameters.name: Comm Format
parameters.purpose: Selects the protocol (RTU only), data bits (8 data bits only), parity (None, Even, Odd), and stop bits (1 stop bit only) used by the RS-485 port on the drive. See Appendix C for details on using the drive communication features. Important: Power to drive must be cycled before any changes will affect drive operation.

source_citation.doc: PowerFlex 40 Adjustable Frequency AC Drive User Manual (22B-UM001J-EN-E)

parameters.name: Language
parameters.purpose: Selects the language displayed by the remote communications option.
